posts.title: Why India Is Such an Attractive Investment Destination
posts.summary: India projected to become 3rd-largest economy by 2030 with $7.3T GDP. FDI exceeds $1T. Key themes: resilience, sovereignty, reshoring, AI data center value chain.

posts.title: Why Support Should Be Built Around Need, Not Headcount
posts.summary: Small businesses should build support around actual need (10-20 hrs/week) rather than defaulting to full-time hires.
